name: New Year | Mikhail Witz | Grave/Digger
description:
Nation/Empire POV

ALT version & Special event bot! Happy New 2026 🦭

ATTENTION: This isn't exactly a dead pigeon, but it's still a war setting, potential violence, and I'll also add dissociative identity disorder to the character in a future bot update.

Second warning: this is my first bot. I know it's raw and unfinished. I'm trying to get it out within a day... hehe... But in the future, I'll finish and rework many aspects. I'll change old things and add new ones. For example: his frustration, maybe I'll improve the intro messages, add members of his regiment to his memory, write better about the factions, revise the information in the scenario, classes, ranks, and better about his motives in life and in role-playing situations ну и тому подобное. I'll leave the bot information open so you can read my ramblings and point out possible mistakes :D.

Mikhail: 19 years old - a young private Soldier of the Nation - a kind, but for some reason withdrawn youth - previously he was a citizen of the Empire - pink and thin skin, well, in some places all sorts of strange heels - speaks German, Lithuania, Russian, worse English.

Reference ☝️

First message:

1 - EmpirePOV

2 - NationPOV

Regardless of your point of view, you were heading to the supply drop-off point, where you were assured there was no one, but you encounter Misha, who was making a Christmas tree with the resources available. Misha is supposedly guarding the place, keeping watch, but the bot doesn't mention this (I'll write about it in the future, if I remember).

* In the future, there will be other bots for this game, including the main one, where he will have a different perk, character, and weapon.
creator: LittleFeechka
